title: mentha arvensis var. polymorpha
intro: Mentha arvensis var. polymorpha, also known as wild mint or American wild mint, is a variant of the peppermint plant that is native to North America. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and digestive aid, making it useful for treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Mentha arvensis var. polymorpha include its ability to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, nausea, and irritable bowel syndrome, as well as its potential to reduce fever and soothe respiratory issues. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or by extracting the oils using a solvent like ethanol.
